title: SP+ES Standard Set Tile Adhesive (white) 20kg
description: UltraTile ProFlex SPES Standard Set Flexible Tile Adhesive 20kg is a single part, standard set, flexible adhesive for wall and floor tiles. It is specially formulated for extended workability, allowing for projects to have that last minute touch without worry the adhesive will set too soon.Specially formulated for enhanced adhesion and flexibility, the adhesive is ideal for areas where slight movement or vibration may occur. Classified as S1 in accordance with EN12004 it has the high level of deformation for greater tolerance to movement.The adhesive unique qualities make it ideal for fixing tiles to a whole array of surfaces and substrates:ConcreteConcreteSand/cement screedSand/cement screedPlywood overlay (15mm min)Plywood overlay (15mm min)Tile backer boardsTile backer boardsCement faced fibre boardsCement faced fibre boardsAnhydrite/calcium sulphate/gypsum based screedsAnhydrite/calcium sulphate/gypsum based screedsTile on Tile* (Existing ceramic, porcelain and natural stone tiles (overlay) known as "Tile on Tile")Tile on Tile* (Existing ceramic, porcelain and natural stone tiles (overlay) known as "Tile on Tile")Firm and stable plasterFirm and stable plasterPlasterboardPlasterboardSand/cement renderSand/cement renderConcrete brick/blockConcrete brick/blockHard vinyl tilesHard vinyl tilesFlooring grade asphaltFlooring grade asphaltUltraTile Proflex Tile Adhesive is perfect for interior or exterior projects, wet or dry conditions and an array of different tiles:CeramicCeramicPorcelainPorcelainGlassGlassMosaicsMosaicsMarbleMarbleTravertineTravertineGraniteGraniteLimestoneLimestoneTerracottaTerracottaQuarryQuarrySlateSlateQuartzQuartzBrick slipsBrick slips Specifications Unit Size 20kg bags Standard Conformity EN 12004 Class C2TE S1 Bed Thickness 3mm-20mm Coverage 3mm bed thickness you will require 4.5kg of material per m2 Pot Life 2 hours depending upon temperature and substrate Set Time 16 hours dependent up
features: HIGH-PERFORMANCE FLEXIBLE ADHESIVE: Single-part, standard-set tile adhesive designed for strong bonding on walls and floors, with excellent flexibility for areas prone to slight movement or vibration.
EXTENDED WORKABILITY TIME: Specially formulated for long open time, giving you freedom to make last-minute adjustments without the adhesive setting too quickly.

SUITABLE FOR MULTIPLE SUBSTRATES: Bonds to concrete, screed, plywood (15mm+), backer boards, fibre-cement boards, gypsum/anhydrite screeds, tile-on-tile, plaster, plasterboard, vinyl tiles, asphalt and more.

FOR ALL TILE TYPES: Perfect for ceramic, porcelain, glass, mosaics, quarry, terracotta, slate, marble, granite, travertine, limestone, quartz and brick slips—ideal for interior or exterior, wet or dry areas.
PROFESSIONAL-GRADE PERFORMANCE: Classified C2TE S1 under EN 12004 for strong adhesion, reduced slip, extended open time and high deformability. Bed thickness 3–20mm; approx. 4.5kg/m² coverage at 3mm.
RELIABLE SET & WORK TIMES: Pot life approx. 2 hours; sets in around 16 hours depending on temperature and substrate conditions.
DURABLE & LONG-LASTING: 12-month shelf life when stored unopened in dry, frost-free conditions (5–25°C). Supplied in 20kg trade-size bags.
